title: オークスの後に・種火、灯して

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Mejiro Dober is full of joy, both
because she's managed to control her shaking
and because her body is overflowing with power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having grown strong enough to push past her
fear, Mejiro Dober is now burning with
excitement for the upcoming Shuka Sho!
